zh.Little Moreton, Moreton cum Alcumlow, As: 英國英格蘭爾莫雷頓 姆 阿爾姆洛福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Brereton於1490年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈桑爾時，她的父親Andrew Brereton42歲，母親Agnes Legh45歲。她於1511年與William Moreton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1552年在英國爾切斯特享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Brereton于1490年出生在英国英格兰爾哈桑爾时，她的父亲Andrew Brereton42岁，母亲Agnes Legh45岁。她于1511年与William Moreton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1552年在英国爾切斯特享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Brereton was born in 1490, in Hassall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew Brereton, was 42 and her mother, Agnes Legh, was 45. She married William Moreton in 1511, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1552, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Brereton est née en 1490, à Hassall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Brereton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes Legh, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé William Moreton en 1511, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1552, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Little Moreton, Moreton cum Alcumlow, As: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴 c 알c로
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Brereton(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 하사에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Brereton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Legh(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 체실르에서 William Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.
